ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "prior_mean" REAL /* Prior mean of the parameter */,
  "prior_sd" REAL /* Prior standard deviation of the parameter */,
  "prop_sd" REAL /* Proposal standard deviation of the parameter */,
  "flag_include" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the parameter is included in the analysis (1 for included, 0 for excluded) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project ID */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the parameter was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the parameter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the parameter */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the project was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the researcher was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the researcher's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_parameters" (
  "project_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-parameter relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the parameter within the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project-parameter relationship */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_parameters_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality rating or description */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "project_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-dataset relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset within the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project-dataset relationship */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-member relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project member */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who added the member to the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the member's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "project_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the project */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the project version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
